title: Distill toward a measured teacher gap
description: When distilling to a smaller student, track the student-teacher quality gap on real tasks so size reduction stays principled.
body: Use when compressing a capable teacher into a cheaper student model. Do not assume matching soft labels guarantees task quality — distillation loss can fall while task accuracy lags. Actions: train the student on teacher outputs (and task labels where available), measure the student-teacher gap on the real task and capability evals, and iterate on student size or data until the gap fits the budget. Validation signals include a benchmark of student vs teacher on the target task and a gap within the accepted bound. Risk boundary: a student that mimics style but not capability fails on hard cases; if the gap exceeds the budget, escalate to a larger student rather than ship.
